## Bot review triage

After CI is green, sweep the inline comments and either fix, defer
(file follow-up), or dismiss with a one-line reason.

- [ ] Gemini Code Assist
- [ ] GitHub Copilot review
- [ ] DeepSource
- [ ] SonarCloud
